description: ruyOS vault scaffold — the single source of truth for setup and update skills

content_files._comment: Every file uses repo_path (location in this repo) and install_path (destination in the vault). For most files they're identical — for skills/commands they differ because claude-skills/ maps to .claude/.

generated_files._comment: Files that setup-ruyos creates at install time. Not in the repo — generated from these definitions.

files.heading: ruyOS
files.body:
Welcome to the vault. This is the operating system for your life, work, and projects — powered by Obsidian and AI.

Run `/start-day` to begin, or explore the folders to set up your context.

files.heading: Intelligence
files.body:
Accumulated knowledge — meetings, decisions, research, and insights. This is the vault's long-term memory.

## Subfolders

- **Meetings/** — Meeting transcripts and notes. Format: `YYYY-MM-DD <meeting-name>.md`
- **Decisions/** — Significant decisions with rationale, context, and date
- **Research/** — Market research, competitor analysis, technology evaluations
- **Insights/** — Observations, patterns, things learned over time

files.heading: Decision log
files.body:
Significant decisions with rationale. Newest first.

<!-- Format for new entries:
## YYYY-MM-DD — Decision title
**Context:** Why this came up
**Decision:** What was decided
**Rationale:** Why this over alternatives
**Impact:** What changed as a result
-->

files.heading: Writing preferences
files.body:
Tone, style, and rules for all written output. AI agents must follow these.

## Voice

-

## Tone

-

## Living rules

Rules that accumulate over time. Add new ones as you discover preferences.

- Active voice preferred
- No filler words (just, simply, basically, actually)
- Clear over clever — say what you mean
- Sentence case for headings
- American English spelling

## Things to avoid

-

system.note: Optional — required for document creation skills (docx, pptx, xlsx, pdf)
